subject: GDPR Article 15 Data Export Request - Acme Corp
body:
Hi Data Ops team,

Please process the following GDPR Article 15 (Right of Access) data export request:

**Client:** Acme Corp
**Account ID:** ACC-2847
**Deadline:** 14 days from request date

<cite index="10-2,10-7">Under GDPR Article 12, data subject access requests must be handled without undue delay and in any event within one month of receipt.</cite> The 14-day internal deadline ensures we have buffer time to compile and verify the data export before the regulatory response deadline.

Please confirm receipt and provide an expected completion date.

Thanks,
Communications Team
